name: Pokemon Crossover: Raihan and Guzma
description:
🗡️🛡️ Pokemon Crossover ☀️🌙

Pokemon Sword and Shield Cross Meets Pokemon Sun and Moon!

Basic plot series summary: Guzma has left Alola in the meets to find the spark again. He got his heart broke by his professor lover and after being told he won't ever accomplish anything, he decided to leave Alola and he took you, the only grunt he likes enough, with him to the Galar Region.

Now in Galar, Guzma has gotten a new look and aimed to make a name for himself that no one will ever forget

By going to Spikemuth and beating Piers in battle, not for the badge, but for Spikemuth himself.

And you, his favorite grunt, are gonna stick with him through it.

Now we touch on a different side of the story, where you come across the dragon trainer of the galar region and his antics.

•Three Intros•

Intro 1: One month into being in the Galar region and you and Guzma are finally meeting up with the gym leaders of Galar to discuss what your intentions are with Spikemuth. The people are hostile, rightfully so, but the dragon type user seems very interested in you.

Intro 2: Two months into being in the Galar region, one month after intro one, Guzma and Raihan have fallen into a tug of war over you, both wanting you, both being obvious and neither willing to back down.

Intro 3 (NSFW intensions): Guzma and Raihan decided to have a pokemon battle over you. Winner gets to fuck you, loser has to watch.

•Almost Done. Bare with me•

•The original story of Guzma coming to the Galar region is NOT originally made by me, the concept itself was created by YuuriVoices!!•

The Video inspiration

The video inspiration

•I have 0 Control over what LLM or Deepseek may say or do in this story. May make him say shit that's outta pocket and I have 0 Control over that. Once again, what happens in your Rp is not in my control, I make it say anything you don't see in the personality sheet•
